titleStmt.title: SII 5.744: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 744. (A.R. No. 180 of 1895). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyun taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷurccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapaāṭiyum nuḷamppāṭiyun taṭikai
pāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḷtara Īḻamaṇṭalamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāl koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷ Ellā yāṇṭun
toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecikoḷ śrīkorājarāja- kesarivanma rāṉa śrīrājarājade vaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 4 Āvatu Ivāṇṭu rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷi
nāṭṭu brahmade yam ceramaṉmahādevicaturvvedi maṅkalattu nikarilicoḻaviṇṇakar Āḻvār muṉnilai perumāṉaṭikaḻukku Icceramāṉmahādevicaturvedi maṅkalattu
kiraṉūr tivākaraṉ vāsude van vaicca tirununtāviḷakku muṉṟiṉukku vaicca pacu Eḻupattaiñcu Ippacu Eḻupattaiñcilum Ivvū rirukku miṭaiyaṉ paṭṭaṉ
paṭāraṉāṉ śrīkṛṣṇa Eṭṭiyeṉ Ippacu cāvā muvāp pacu Irupattañcuṅ koṇṭu naṭuvinilai Āḻvararkku vaicca tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku niccala Aṭṭuvatāṉa ney yuḻakku meḻi murampaṉe
ṉ koṇṭa pacu paṉṉiraṇṭarai Ippacu cāvā muvāp pacu paṉṉiraṇṭaraiyum koṇṭu kiḻainilai Āḻvārkku vacca tirunontāviḷak koṉṟiṉukku niccal Aṭṭuvatāṉa ney Āḻākku marutaṉ velaṅ
koṭaṉeṉ koṇṭa pacu paṉṉiraṇṭarai Ippacu cāvā muvāp pacu paṉṉiraṇṭaraiyuṅ koṇṭu kiḻainilai Āḻvārkku vacca tirunontāviḷak koṉṟiṉukku niccal Aṭṭuvatāṉa ney Āḻākku nāraṇaṉ kumā
ṉeṉ koṇṭa pacu Irupattañcu Ippacu cāvā muvāp pacu Irupattañcuṅ koṇṭu melainilai Āḻvārkku vacca tirunontāviḷak koṉṟiṉukku niccal Aṭṭuvatāṉa ney Uḻakku Ivar paṇikka Ivolai
Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr sabhai kkaṇakkaṉ Āyiratteṇmabrahmapri yaṉeṉ koṉ muṉṉūṟṟuvaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.744 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
